nasb.text: ‘Now when the man with the discharge becomes cleansed from his discharge, then he shall count off for himself seven days for his cleansing; he shall then wash his clothes and bathe his body in running water and will become clean.

esv.text: “And when the one with a discharge is cleansed of his discharge, then he shall count for himself seven days for his cleansing, and wash his clothes. And he shall bathe his body in fresh water and shall be clean.

cnv.text: “有異常排泄的人痊愈的時候，就要為自己得潔淨計算七天，洗淨自己的衣服，用活水洗身，就潔淨了。

ccb.text: 他病愈后，必须经过七天的洁净期，要洗净衣服，用清水沐浴，这样就洁净了。
